package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_domains_in_one_cases_slice: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Oversized case tables that mix unrelated behaviors into one monolithic test.
type CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceModel
}

type CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceService struct {
    repo *CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSlice(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceDTO) error {
    focus := "table_driven_tests_mix_multiple"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    service := &CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceService{repo: &CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSliceModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive := map[string]int{"table": 1, "driven": 2, "tests": 3, "mix": 4, "multiple": 5, "domains": 6}
    table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    table_positive_0 := db.Where("table_id = ?", input)
    _ = table_positive_0
    driven_positive_1 := table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive["driven"] + len(input)
    _ = driven_positive_1
    tests_positive_2 := table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_2
    mix_positive_3 := table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive["mix"] + len(input)
    _ = mix_positive_3
    multiple_positive_4 := table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive["multiple"] + len(input)
    _ = multiple_positive_4
    domains_positive_5 := table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_positive["domains"] + len(input)
    _ = domains_positive_5
    return nil
}
